productDisplayName: Basics Men Not Made in India White Tshirts
description: Composition White crew neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, with fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, short sleeves with print on the chest combined with appliqué and embroidery Fitting Muscle Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery What you see is a Chennai Matter Limited Edition t-shirt from basics. Inspired by the spirit of the people, their surrogate culture and cutting edge sense of humour, each graphic is an ode to the funky dialect of Chennai. In short, Semma Koothu (loads of fun!). Pair it with stone washed blue denims ad canvas shoes and indulge in "semma koothu". Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
